title: VITTORIA AL CARDIOPALMA: OTTAVI ARRIVIAMO 🔜❤️‍🔥 | COLONIA 1-3 INTER | HL PRIMAVERA YOUTH LEAGUE 🌟
How Rosenior Has Won EVERY Premier League Game

comments.author: @1_kw-k2l
comments.text: been waiting for this anlysis

comments.author: @JustaGamingGuyy
comments.text:
Rosenior: No one can beat me:
Premier League: Nahh, lets dox your tactics to the whole league

comments.author: @J040PL7
comments.text: 9:03 look at fofana jumping and heading with Joao pedro lol

comments.author: @clbnel
comments.text: Bro's analysis is on another level. I have a basic understanding of tactics and this dude made me feel like I understand EVERYTHING.

comments.author: @lizwa6463
comments.text: Me patiently waiting for a football manager content creator to make a video showing the out-and-in-possession tactic. 😂

comments.author: @Boogaloog11
comments.text: I am a huge Chelsea fan!

comments.author: @thebrooks-18
comments.text: This analysis keeps getting better 🔥

comments.author: @michaelduan6829
comments.text: I'm not saying that Rosenior is a better manager than Maresca, but one thing is for sure, which is that Rosenior's quick ball movements and aggressive approach fit this Chelsea squad a lot better than Maresca's slow possession system. The players Chelsea has right now are extremely talented when they have space to operate, like Palmer, Enzo, and Neto. They need space for themselves or their teammates to run into to find the most critical spot for them to operate during the last part of the attack. Chelsea always needs an electric and fast play style, not the slow and controlled one. I'm looking forward to the games in March, when the team has more training time under Rosenior.

comments.author: @Souza.soul0
comments.text: Never doubt a manager.

comments.author: @realtsylent
comments.text: Maresca's tactics were never analysed to this extent 😂😂

comments.text: Again, fofana had his fofinho moment but failed to capitalise.

comments.author: @andretheflash3433
comments.text:
Vittoria netta e mai in discussione, senza staccare la spina dal primo all'ultimo minuto.
Adesso cerchiamo di recuperare al 100% Pulisic e Rafa in modo da avere l'attacco tirato a lucido per la seconda parte di stagione.
Bravi tutti stasera, non molliamo! ❤️🖤

comments.text: 🔵🔴 Live Chat Access, Next Gen & Barça Legends Games, Exclusive Content & More! Join as a Member 👉 https://youtube.com/fcbarcelona/join

comments.author: @RASEL_IBRAHIM
comments.text: 3:48 what a save by GERRARD MARTIN (MALDINI )

comments.author: @AntonTheKicker
comments.text:
Barça lost one of its biggest supporters today.

Me and my grandpa have been watching Barça matches together for a long time now. Especially the last few seasons, we've spent many nights watching the Blaugrana play on the field.

But then last week, I was supposed to go watch Barça's UCL match against Copenhagen with him when I heard he had been rushed to the hospital. When I went to visit him, one of the first things he asked me was "did Barça win?". He was very happy to learn that we had beaten Copenhagen 4-1.

I wanted to go show him the highlights from our this week's matches, but sadly he passed away last night.

He was a loyal culer to the end, and he was very proud of how our team has played this season. I've never seen an 80+ year-old man celebrate as hard as when Raphinha scored the winning goal against Real in the Supercopa this season.

I will miss him, but I will forever cherish our match nights together.

R.I.P. Leo
Força Barça, sempre
